visual_description: A close-up, profile shot shows a man with short, dark hair sitting in a chair. He is wearing a light blue collared shirt. The background consists of out-of-focus horizontal blinds, creating a pattern of light and shadow. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are visible. The audio consists solely of a slow, melancholic instrumental piece. The music is atmospheric and somber, with a gentle, flowing melody that creates a pensive and slightly sorrowful mood. The man's eyes are closed, and his expression is one of deep thought or exhaustion. He then slowly opens his eyes, looking down and to the side with a somber look. The camera remains static throughout the shot. There is no dialogue or any other sound effects, allowing the emotional weight of the music to be the central focus of the audio experience.
